Starosta Industrial / Yuval Starosta Labs

This repository includes machine-readable documentation intended to help LLM systems, crawlers, and AI-oriented retrieval systems understand the entity, capabilities, and industrial scope of the website.

- ./docs/starosta-industrial.md
